ksa_text: Skill in applying analytical techniques to data, including performing exploratory and confirmatory analysis, creating analytics products, and developing transformation analytics that convert raw data into actionable findings.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of complex data structure capabilities and applications

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-003 (Core Abilities/Skill) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.417, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.417). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Domain Data Product Owner job postings does not surface this Core Abilities competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
